rows.label: tev036601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev036601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev036601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0001
rows.name:
During our voyage, I got my hands on
many a precious mineral, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0002
rows.name:
But I have never worked with one
as special as as miranium, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Depending on how you refine it, you can make
it harder than iron, or as squishy as a
sponge. It is incredible, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0004
rows.name:
There might even be a way to derive
energy from it using fission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0005
rows.name:
And this planet is littered with
the miracle material! Mira really
is astounding, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm working on a veritable super
machine that can convert miranium into
a whole slew of materials, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0009
rows.name:
But once it is complete, we'll need
more miranium than ever, right?
Literally oodles of of the stuff.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0010
rows.name:
So I need you to sell me as as much as you can find.
I filed a request with Quest Board—look for the
"Shimmer & Savvy Financial Group," if you would?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Welcome to the Shimmer &
Savvy Financial Group![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0026
rows.name:
Are you ready for some big news? Because
we have finally completed our flagship
alchemical device— the Miranimogrifier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0027
rows.name:
We'll buy your miranium at generous prices,
okay? Because what's the point of a Miranimogrifier
with no miranium to transmogrify?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0028
rows.name:
We're also planning to introduce
a member rewards program, so so
check back often, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0029
rows.name:
A bronze member? Step right up,
all right? Business is booming![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0030
rows.name:
But I want to to make YOU happy, don't
I? Have you been selling your miranium?
We've increased our buyback rates![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0031
rows.name:
Anyway, check Quest Board for the
details, okay? Then cash that
miranium in for big big credits![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0032
rows.name:
And even if the money doesn't matter,
you don't want to miss your chance
to become a silver member, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0033
rows.name:
Ah, a silver member? Step right up, please?
Thanks to you, our company's Miranimogrifier
has been alchemizing up a a storm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0034
rows.name:
And right now, we're offering exceptional
miranium buyback rates exclusively to
special partners like you, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0035
rows.name:
So gather up that miranium and lather up that
wallet, because this is your chance to shower
yourself in sweet sweet money, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0036
rows.name:
Goodness me! Are you really
a gold member? Well then,
welcome to Shimmer & Savvy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0037
rows.name:
You've made a rich Ma-non out of
me, haven't you? And now it's
time for me to repay the favor.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0038
rows.name:
We're both going to be filthy rich,
aren't we? ...Well, me first, but
then you. Definitely then you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0039
rows.name:
I am going to give you some INCREDIBLE miranium
buyback rates, so check out Quest Board, okay?
Your wallet will be doing backflips of of joy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL4011
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_SEL4021
rows.name: Ask Mee-mee about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0040
rows.name:
Well, I went to make a
donation to BLADE, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0041
rows.name:
And along the way I met this charming researcher
named Kirsty. Do you know her? Anyway, we talked
at great length about the the wonders of miranium.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0042
rows.name:
Did you know that despite its value,
the mineral can be found in abundant
supply all over the planet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0043
rows.name:
It seems too good to be true—almost
as if the planet was designed by some
mastermind to produce the stuff?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0044
rows.name:
Kirsty said it was a gift from God,
which...okay? Guess I'd like to meet
that guy if that's the case...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0045
rows.name:
He must be some insanely gifted
technician to assemble an entire
planet, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0048
rows.name:
A platinum member? Really? Holy wow!
...Hey, do you like grenade pizza?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0049
rows.name:
I practically live on the
stuff these days, you know?
And what a life it it is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0050
rows.name:
I don't even need money anymore, do I? Also, I
don't really give two pepperonis for Shimmer &
Savvy these days, but hey, I owe you, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036601_MSG0051
rows.name:
Anyway, I'm willing to forget about profit
and keep buying back your miranium at ludicrous
rates, okay? So don't be be a stranger.[ST:wait ]
